user.bio: Drinking Swill, Dodging Diabetes and Patting Cardboard Boxes. Lifes Good.

items.badge_description: It's time to give bottle shops some love by adding them as your purchased location. That's 150 check-ins with a purchased location! Tag 5 more to get to Level 31. Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast
Cheers to another beer at the Iron Duke.  Keep checking in beers to level up!
Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 215 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 44.

items.checkin_comment: Peachy indeed, very much a juicy boi.

items.badge_description: You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 455 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 92!

items.checkin_comment:
Youd have no idea that its 7.2%Abv

So smooth
